info.title: tailwindcss-dotnet
info.description: A dotnet tool for installing and invoking Tailwind CSS.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A dotnet tool for installing and invoking Tailwind CSS. Default version of Tailwind CSS CLI is v4.2.2

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install Tailwind CSS into the app

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch and build your Tailwind CSS on file changes

commands.name: exec
commands.description: Execute Tailwind CSS platform-specific executable with your own build options
